creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/support/webresources/#general> 

Unix Guru Universe <http://www.ugu.com/> appears to be quite outdated. Please consider removal. 

Doing so will reduce the shortlist to one item. 

Take this opportunity to add an alternative resource? 

<https://distrowatch.com/table.php?distribution=freebsd> there's a list of releated websites. Add one of those, maybe? Or link to the DistroWatch page?
